title: Amethyst Expansion RP
description: Adds amethyst weapons, armors and tools.
body:
This resourcepack required My datapack Amethyst Expansion: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethyst-expansion-dp](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethyst-expansion-dp) 
to work

![Amethyst Expansion Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zVG2op5g/images/d6ff42d68b6800f49d180c85273b551ee85ba8e9.png)

Features:
-Full Armor amethyst set and Dark Amethyst set, better than amethyst. -All the amethyst tools, axe, sword, hoe, pickaxe and shovel, Fishing rod, amethyst apples and amethyst foods textures.
